hero.subtitle: GovAssist AI helps you navigate government schemes, check eligibility, and understand documents with ease. Your personal guide to Indian governance.

features.title: Everything you need
features.chat_desc: Ask questions in English, Hindi, or Marathi. Get instant answers about schemes and procedures.
features.schemes_desc: Find schemes you are eligible for. Filter by category, age, and occupation.
features.docs_desc: Upload documents to get summaries and explanations in simple language.

subscribe.title: Stay Updated
subscribe.desc: Get the latest updates on government schemes and new features directly in your inbox.

about.title: About GovAssist
about.desc_1: GovAssist is an intelligent platform designed to bridge the gap between citizens and government services. We leverage advanced AI to simplify the discovery and understanding of government schemes, ensuring that every citizen can access the benefits they are entitled to with ease and clarity.
about.desc_2: Our mission is to democratize access to public welfare through technology, making complex bureaucratic processes transparent, accessible, and user-friendly for everyone.

1.desc: Driving the project vision and architecture.

2.desc: Developing robust features and seamless integrations.

3.desc: Focusing on user experience and interface design.

4.desc: Providing expert guidance and academic mentorship.

tech_stack.title: Core Technology Stack
tech_stack.subtitle: Built with industry-leading tools and frameworks for maximum performance and scalability.

items.React: Frontend library for building dynamic user interfaces.
items.TypeScript: Typed superset of JavaScript for scalable development.
items.LangChain: Framework for developing applications powered by LLMs.
items.Tailwind CSS: Utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI design.
items.SQLAlchemy: Python SQL toolkit and Object Relational Mapper.
items.AI_LLM: Powered by advanced Large Language Models.
items.Python: Core programming language for backend logic.
